content:
🔹 “Rule of Three” Challenge: If a student scores a perfect 100% on three mastery exams, they are exempt from the final paper.🔹 Instead, they submit an annotated bibliography & a final reflection and take over the class for one lecture.


✅ Why This Works:
• Gives students choice & control over their workload.
• Rewards excellence & effort while maintaining academic rigor.
• Recognizes that some students need flexibility at the end of the semester (e.g., nursing students with exams).

2️⃣ Unlocking Assignment Drops

Students in any path can unlock the dropping of two lowest assignments by:
1. Completing all their major assignments on time.
2. Submitting a challenge proposal (such as an alternative text, discussion topic, or outside reading connection).
